calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Daniel G. Balich, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC., dba YELLOW CAB COMPANY.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARIA LARA and PERLA MORENO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Chris Denny sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $17,646.85
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $520.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $18,166.85
Judgment signed in open court.
